zh.Bridgnorth, Shropshire, England: 英國史洛普爾布利其諾斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Warner於1414年出生在英國史洛普爾布利其諾斯時，她的父親Baron Henry Whetenhale Warner56歲，母親Baroness Cecily Spayne52歲。她於1435年與Walter Greene在英國英格蘭史洛普爾布利其諾斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1471年12月11日在英國英格蘭素瑞貝爾蒙享年57歲，埋葬在英國米德萊可倫敦。

zh-hans.Bridgnorth, Shropshire, England: 英国史洛普爾布利其諾斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Warner于1414年出生在英国史洛普爾布利其諾斯时，她的父亲Baron Henry Whetenhale Warner56岁，母亲Baroness Cecily Spayne52岁。她于1435年与Walter Greene在英国英格兰史洛普爾布利其諾斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1471年12月11日在英国英格兰素瑞貝爾蒙享年57岁，埋葬在英国米德萊可倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: Warner
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin) and North German: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements war(in) ‘protection, shelter’ or ‘guard’ + heri, hari ‘army’. The name was introduced into England by the Normans in the form Warnier (Old French Garnier). Compare Garner and Werner .
English (of Norman origin): shortened form of Warrener (see Warren 2).

Irish (Cork): when this is not the Anglo-Norman name (see above), an Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Murnáin (see Murnane ), found in medieval records as Iwarrynane, from a genitive or plural form of the name, in which m is lenited.

variants.name: Garner
meanings: English (of Norman origin): perhaps occasionally from the Old French personal name Garnier (see Garnier ), but it is exeptionally rare as a personal name in medieval England and no certain evidence has been found for its use as a surname. Compare Warner .

English: from Middle English gern(i)er, garner, gurner, Anglo-Norman French gerner ‘granary’ (Old French grenier, from Late Latin granarium, a derivative of granum ‘grain’). It was probably a metonymic occupational name for someone in charge of the stores kept in a granary.
English and Scottish: commonly shortened form of   Gardner  .

variants.name: Werner
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Otto, Hans, Erwin, Heinz, Gerhard, Ernst, Helmut, Horst, Klaus, Arno, Dieter.

German, Dutch, Polish, Czech, Hungarian, Norwegian, Swedish, and Danish: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements warin ‘protection, shelter’ or ‘guard’ + heri, hari ‘army’. The surname of German origin is also found in Britain (compare Warner ) and France (Alsace and Lorraine). Compare Verner .
Germanized or Americanized form of Czech, Hungarian, Swedish, Danish, Croatian, and Slovenian   Verner  , a cognate or variant of 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Warner was born in 1414, in Bridgnorth, Shropshire, England, her father, Baron Henry Whetenhale Warner, was 56 and her mother, Baroness Cecily Spayne, was 52. She married Walter Greene in 1435, in Bridgnorth, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 11 December 1471, in Bermondsey, Surrey, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 57, and was buried in London, Middlesex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Warner est née en 1414, à Bridgnorth, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Baron Henry Whetenhale Warner, avait 56 ans et sa mère, Baroness Cecily Spayne, avait 52 ans. Elle a épousé Walter Greene en 1435, à Bridgnorth, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 11 décembre 1471, à Bermondsey, Surrey, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterrée à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Warner 1414 in Bridgnorth, Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Baron Henry Whetenhale Warner 56 und ihre Mutter Baroness Cecily Spayne 52. Sie hat 1435 in Bridgnorth, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom Walter Greene geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 11. Dezember 1471 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Bermondsey, Surrey, England, United Kingdom und wurde in London, Middlesex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Warner è nata il nel 1414 nel Bridgnorth, Shropshire, England, sua padre, Baron Henry Whetenhale Warner, aveva 56 anni e sua madre, Baroness Cecily Spayne, aveva 52 anni. Lei sposato Walter Greene nel 1435, nel Bridgnorth, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 11 dicembre 1471, nel Bermondsey, Surrey, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 57 anni, e fu sepolta a London, Middlesex, England.

ja.Bridgnorth, Shropshire, England: イギリスシュロプシュアイアブリドグノース
ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Warnerが1414年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアブリドグノースで生まれた時，父Baron Henry Whetenhale Warnerは56歳，母Baroness Cecily Spayneは52歳であった。1435年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアブリドグノースでWalter Greeneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1471年12月11日にイギリスイギリススリーバーモンドセイで57歳で死去し，イギリスミッドレセックスロンドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Warner(이)가 1414년 영국 슈럽실르 브리지노르스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Baron Henry Whetenhale Warner(은)는 56세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Baroness Cecily Spayne(은)는 52세였다. 그녀는 1435년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 브리지노르스에서 Walter Greene(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1471년 12월 11일 영국 잉글랜드 수리 버몽시에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 미들레세스 런던에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Warner nasceu em 1414, em Bridgnorth, Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Baron Henry Whetenhale Warner, tinha 56 anos e sua mãe, Baroness Cecily Spayne, tinha 52 anos. Ela casou-se com Walter Greene em 1435, em Bridgnorth, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 11 de dezembro de 1471, em Bermondsey, Surrey, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 57 anos, e foi sepultada em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Warner родилась в 1414 г. в местности бриджнорт, шропшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Baron Henry Whetenhale Warner было 56 лет, а матери, которую звали Baroness Cecily Spayne, 52. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Walter Greene в 1435 г. в местности бриджнорт, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 11 декабря 1471 г. в местности бирмондси, сурри, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 57 лет и была похоронена в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Warner nació en 1414, en Bridgnorth, Shropshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Baron Henry Whetenhale Warner, tenía 56 años y su mamá, Baroness Cecily Spayne, tenía 52 años. Se casó con Walter Greene en 1435, en Bridgnorth, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 11 de diciembre de 1471, en Bermondsey, Surrey, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 57 años, y fue sepultada en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra.
